message:
fix(tools): update test assertions to match revised thread-id validation wording

Change expected error substring from "existing reply-seeded thread" to
"reserved for reply-seeded thread" in three thread-id validation tests,
matching the updated validate_explicit_thread_id_for_send error message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
